notes: Agent monologue + short confirm; exercises read-back/confirm path and SPEAKER_0 labeling.

utterances.speaker: speaker_0
utterances.text: I would like to confirm that your name is Sam Smith. Your date of birth is 02/02/1950. You are a female. In San Francisco, California at 123 Main Street, ZIP code 60091. You want $500,000 worth of coverage. And you are six foot one. You weigh two hundred and fifty pounds. You have no existing coverage. Is that correct?

utterances.speaker: caller
utterances.text: Mi nombre es Carlos Rivera Mendoza.

utterances.speaker: caller
utterances.text: Nací el catorce de marzo de mil novecientos ochenta y cinco.

utterances.speaker: applicant
utterances.text: I live at 4521 Maple Avenue, San Antonio, Texas 78201.

notes: Non-answer should not invent DOB or face amount.
